allow: Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-Item 'c:\\Users\\Prateek Chandra\\OneDrive - NexGen Enterprises\\Claude\\Agentic AI\\FTF- Survey Invoicing & Billing Delivery \(E2E\)\\Resources\\FTF_API_Documentation.xlsx' | Select-Object FullName, Exists")

hooks.command:
powershell -NoProfile -Command "$ws='c:\Users\Prateek Chandra\OneDrive - NexGen Enterprises\Claude\Agentic AI\FTF- Survey Invoicing & Billing Delivery (E2E)\'; $m=Get-Content ($ws+'memory.md') -Raw -EA SilentlyContinue; $l=Get-Content ($ws+'learnings.md') -Raw -EA SilentlyContinue; $ctx='=== MANDATORY SESSION FILES - READ BEFORE ANYTHING ELSE ===

--- memory.md ---
'+$m+'

--- learnings.md ---
'+$l; @{hookSpecificOutput=@{hookEventName='SessionStart';additionalContext=$ctx}} | ConvertTo-Json -Compress"
